{{Item
| image = Birthday hat.png
| id = birthday_hat
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Double Dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Craft with Paper to add a Secondary color to the hat
}}

'''Birthday Hat''' is a double-dyeable equipable item that customizes your dog to look ready for a party.[[File:Doggy contacts display2.png|thumb|205x205px|Double-Dyeable!]]
[[File:Birthday hat display.png|alt=2023-08-01_18 51 47|none|thumb|703x703px|Display provided by @Archon]]
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Paper
+ [[Training Treat]]
|[[File:Birthday hat crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==
{{Accessory_use}}
==Trivia==
*It was introduced to DTN 1.17.2.
*It was added to celebrate MrBlueYeti - Owner of BetterDogs and DTN's Birthday.
